diagrams.title: Exponential PDF Curves
diagrams.description: Shows probability density function for different λ values
elements: All curves start at λ and decrease monotonically
diagrams.purpose: Understand how rate parameter affects distribution shape

diagrams.title: Memoryless Property Visualization
diagrams.description: Illustrates the memoryless property with conditional probability
elements: Shaded area from s to s+t
P(X > s+t AND X > s) = P(X > s+t)
Conditional probability equals unconditional P(X > t)
diagrams.purpose: Visual proof that past waiting time doesn't affect future probabilities

diagrams.title: Exponential vs Geometric Relationship
elements: Geometric: discrete trials until success (1st success on trial k)
Mean of geometric = 1/p, mean of exponential = 1/λ
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the connection between discrete and continuous distributions
